case_title: JIM KHORQE VS. ROSE HUNTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/28/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, ADRIAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-09-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ADRIAN BONILLA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,250.00 FILED BY KHORQE, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, ROSE BONILLA, ADRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00- SERVED JAN-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, ROSE
